title: Crispy Argentinian Chicken with Cherry Glaze
description: A twist on traditional Argentinian grilled chicken, topped with a sweet and sticky cherry glaze. This dish is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and your favorite Argentinian spices.
Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add cherry jam, stir-fry sauce, and garlic to the saucepan.
Simmer glaze for 2-3 minutes, or until thickened.
Brush glaze over grilled chicken during the last minute of cooking.
Top with crispy fried onions and chopped parsley.
